description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a sharply angled, gabled top and a small, circular cap located on one of the sloped roof panels. The lower half of the carton is solid black, while the upper half is a warm orange color, with a white or light gray section forming the roof. One side of the carton features a large black rectangle, possibly intended as a label or display area. The cap is orange and stands out against the lighter roof. The carton has clean, geometric lines and a modern, minimalist appearance, with no visible branding or text. The overall design is typical of single-serving or small family-sized juice cartons found in urban convenience stores or supermarkets.
description: A modern, rectangular juice carton with a gabled top, orange and black color scheme, and a small orange cap on the roof. The design is minimalist, with a large black label area and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange gabled roof, orange upper section, black lower half, and the orange cap on the right roof slope.
description_view_1: Side view displays a mostly black face with a thin orange strip at the top and the white roof, with no visible cap.
description_view_2: Back view highlights a large black rectangle on the orange face, with the gabled roof and cap visible on the left slope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a black face with a circular orange cap on the white roof, and a thin orange strip at the top.
